decisions: Use an allowlist rebuild rather than copying the development archive.
Use the frozen ENGINE-V3 implementation for exact paper reproduction.
Treat pvstackr 0.1.0 as related software, not as the paper runtime.
Do not redistribute PISA unit records under the current PISA-specific terms; provide direct OECD access and a local import contract.
Reproduce archived Pipeline A classic-Rubin intervals and disclose the manuscript wording mismatch.
Register unsupported prose claims as unverified rather than constructing post hoc support.
unresolved_publication_stops: complete portable producers and verification rules
